  -r, --run        (Default: false) Automatically start a test run on startup

  -d, --debug      (Default: false) Runs the test runner in Debug Mode

  -p, --port       (Default: 0) Specifies the TCP port the TestListener and
                   TestAdapters communicate on

  -i, --ip         (Default: 127.0.0.1) Specifies the  the IP TestListener and
                   TestAdapters communicate on

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

  Path (pos. 0)    (Default: .) The path to run tests from, defaults to $PWD
